subcodes.first_line: My sister! Hearken to the voice of thy Brother as He suffereth at the hands of them that wish to slay Him without any proof or clear evidence from their Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: اختی اسمعی ندآء اخیک حین الذی ابتلی بین یدی الذینهم ارادوا قتله
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
